callGraph.callee:
[
    asString(location.address) ?? asString(location.address1) ??
      asString(location.street),
    asString(location.address2),
    asString(location.city),
    asString(location.state) ?? asString(location.region),
    asString(location.zip) ?? asString(location.postalCode),
  ].filter

[
        asString(topLevelAddress.street1),
        asString(topLevelAddress.street2) || null,
        asString(topLevelAddress.city),
        asString(topLevelAddress.state),
        asString(topLevelAddress.zipCode) ?? asString(topLevelAddress.zip),
      ].filter

[
    asString(node.who),
    asString(node.where),
    asString(node.how),
    asString(node.description),
  ]
    .filter((part): part is string => Boolean(part))
    .map

[
            pickText((rawAddr as Record<string, unknown>).streetAddress),
            pickText((rawAddr as Record<string, unknown>).addressLocality),
            pickText((rawAddr as Record<string, unknown>).addressRegion),
            pickText((rawAddr as Record<string, unknown>).postalCode),
          ]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join

            pickText((rawAddr as Record<string, unknown>).addressLocality),
            pickText((rawAddr as Record<string, unknown>).addressRegion),
